blended.narrative: Whitewater is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,382 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
